fixes.origin:
cmd = f"echo {text} >> audit.log"
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
with open("audit.log", "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(text + "\n")
proc = subprocess.CompletedProcess(args=["audit"], returncode=0, stdout="", stderr="")

static_findings.message: subprocess execution may allow OS command injection if input is not controlled.
